name: channel-alf-readiness-auditor
description: Audits FAQ, policy, support-rule, and task drafts before Channel Talk ALF deployment to find missing knowledge, policy conflicts, unsafe answers, handoff gaps, and automation risks.

interface.shortDescription: Audit support documents before ALF deployment.
interface.longDescription: Finds missing FAQ and policy knowledge, policy conflicts, unsafe AI answer risks, handoff conditions, task trigger risks, and document-structure improvements before Channel Talk ALF deployment.
defaultPrompt: Audit this FAQ and policy set before ALF deployment.
Check whether these customer support documents are ready for Channel Talk ALF.
Find policy conflicts and handoff rules before AI support automation.
